name: API Contract Change
about: Propose a field, enum, endpoint, or response-shape change before implementation.
title: 'contract: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the proposed contract change.

## Contract Surface

- [ ] Request field
- [ ] Response field
- [ ] Enum value
- [ ] Endpoint path or method
- [ ] Error shape
- [ ] Authentication/authorization behavior

## Current Behavior

Describe the current request/response shape.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the new shape and include an example payload when possible.

```json

```

## Compatibility

- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Requires migration or data backfill
- [ ] Requires frontend and backend changes in the same PR

## Required Updates

- [ ] Backend Pydantic models
- [ ] Frontend TypeScript types
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Backend/Frontend docs
- [ ] Wiki

## Rationale

Why is this change worth the contract cost?
